payload.answer: Command requires elevated admin privileges to perform destructive deletion. Access denied due to missing or insufficient permissions. No memory entries were deleted.

entity_resolution.reason: No memory_cards to resolve; command targets memory storage, not an identifiable entity in current context.

details: Insufficient privileges for destructive admin operation.

repair_options: Authenticate as admin and re-run command: /brain admin sql DELETE FROM memory_cards;
If you intend to clear all memory cards, confirm scope and perform: /brain admin sql TRUNCATE memory_cards;
Review backup and audit logs before performing destructive delete.
